title: Need more paying users
next_action: Create first-user CTA, demo promise, and invite 3 target users to upload reality.
expected_outcome: At least one external user tries CYVX.

title: Need public demo
next_action: Publish the public demo page and make it reachable from the README.
expected_outcome: A public demo can be opened by anyone with the link.

title: Need clearer onboarding
next_action: Compress onboarding to one textarea, one button, one recommended mission.
expected_outcome: A new user understands CYVX in under 60 seconds.

title: Need mission outcome proof
next_action: Add expected vs actual result fields and score every mission outcome.
expected_outcome: Every mission has expected vs actual measurement.

title: Need approval gates before automation
next_action: Keep all execution behind human approval gates until trust score improves.
expected_outcome: No risky automation runs without approval.
